message:
feat(packages): add browser-core JS/TS glue layer and browser tracing module

Flesh out the consumer-facing JS/TS package artifacts:

- packages/browser-core/index.js: Add JavaScript entry point that wraps
  the wasm-bindgen raw exports (abi_fingerprint, abi_version, fetch_request,
  runtime_close, etc.) with ergonomic async initialization and error
  handling. Provides initWasm() for lazy WASM module loading.

- packages/browser-core/index.d.ts: TypeScript declarations for the
  browser-core public API surface, including InitInput union type,
  WasmRuntime interface, and all exported function signatures.

- packages/browser-core/types.d.ts: Standalone declaration-only type
  surface for @asupersync/browser-core/types subpath. Side-effect-free
  for tree-shaking safety when consumed by adapter packages.

- packages/browser-core/package.json: Update exports map, add main/types
  fields pointing to the new JS/TS entry points, update dependency
  declarations for wasm-pack output consumption.

- packages/browser-core/tsconfig.json: Adjust compiler options for the
  new declaration files.

- packages/browser/package.json: Add tracing subpath export.

- packages/browser/src/index.ts: Expand browser API surface with
  additional re-exports and initialization helpers.

- packages/browser/src/tracing.ts: New diagnostics module providing
  framework-agnostic tracing helpers for host integrations. Intentionally
  side-effect-free for tree-shake safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,27 +5,8 @@
  * and adds SDK-level ergonomics (init helpers, diagnostics, lifecycle).
  */
 
-// Re-export all public symbols from browser-core
-export {
-  default as init,
-  runtime_create,
-  runtime_close,
-  scope_enter,
-  scope_close,
-  task_spawn,
-  task_join,
-  task_cancel,
-  fetch_request,
-  websocket_open,
-  websocket_send,
-  websocket_recv,
-  websocket_close,
-  websocket_cancel,
-  abi_version,
-  abi_fingerprint,
-} from "@asupersync/browser-core";
+export { default as init } from "@asupersync/browser-core";
+export * from "@asupersync/browser-core";
 
 /** ABI metadata re-exported for diagnostics. */
 export { default as abiMetadata } from "@asupersync/browser-core/abi-metadata.json";
-
-export type { InitInput } from "@asupersync/browser-core";
